mapper.insert: insert into AndroidPushDeviceTable(deviceId, uId, fcmToken, status) values(#{deviceId}, #{uId}, #{fcmToken}, #{status}) on duplicate key update uId = values(uId), fcmToken = values(fcmToken), status = values(status), updatedAt = current_timestamp
mapper.select: select * from AndroidPushDeviceTable where uId = #{uId} and status = 1
